items.title: High Court throws out Victoria's $5k cap on political donations

children.content: Two independents have successfully argued Victorian political donation law was unfair and risked allowing wealthy voices to drown out others.

gallery.altText: A square building behind a sign saying "High Court of Australia".

thumbnail.altText: A square building behind a sign saying "High Court of Australia".

items.title: Coronial inquest finds death of sex offender at Corella Place was preventable

children.content: A coronial inquest has found that a supervised facility for sex offenders allowed a resident to have control over prescribed medications, which contributed to his death.

image.altText: Apartments are lined up in a complex side-by-side. There are blue skies and big green trees around too.

items.title: Media boss's wife feared she would die, tore his clothing during alleged attack, court told

children.content: The wife of media executive Antony Catalano fled the couple's luxury apartment and flagged down a passing car for help following a sustained attack by her husband that caused hospitalisation, police allege.

image.altText: A side profile shot of Australian Community Media executive chairman Antony Catalano in an outdoor setting.

items.title: Victoria names inaugural minister for cost of living, renters in reshuffle

children.content: More responsibilities for Attorney-General Sonya Kilkenny and a new cost of living portfolio are among major changes in state cabinet.

image.altText: A group of people.

items.title: Prince Harry tries his hand at AFL as Melbourne visit continues

children.content: The Duke of Sussex is joined by Western Bulldogs players at a Movember event in Melbourne's west.

image.altText: Harry handballs

items.title: Murdered farmer's daughter speaks out as police investigate violent death

children.content: The daughter of a murdered Ouyen farmer says her father had recently made reports to police about sheep thefts from his farm.

articles.title: Police appeal for information over mysterious Ouyen death

children.content: Richard Wills was found shot and buried in a shallow grave at his rural property in Victoria's north-west earlier this week.

image.altText: Man wearing black cap holding a baby

gallery.altText: Man wearing black cap holding a baby

thumbnail.altText: Man wearing black cap holding a baby

items.title: Police investigating claim Katy Perry sexually assaulted Ruby Rose

children.content: Melbourne-born actress Ruby Rose claims US pop star Katy Perry assaulted her at a nightclub in 2010.

image.altText: Ruby Rose and Katy Perry

items.title: Coroner calls for more e-scooter safety awareness after teen's death

children.content: A coroner calls for increased public safety campaigns after a 14-year-old boy died after colliding with a ute while riding an e-scooter in regional Victoria.

image.altText: A close-up view of e-scooter wheels.

items.title: Hidden cameras in change rooms cause regional town hall to postpone events

children.content: An investigation into hidden cameras in change rooms has forced the Horsham Town Hall to postpone events in western Victoria.

gallery.altText: Photo on the corner of the street, looking down two sides of the town hall building with a has a sign: "Horsham Town Hall"

thumbnail.altText: Photo on the corner of the street, looking down two sides of the town hall building with a has a sign: "Horsham Town Hall"

items.title: Victorian opposition pledges to toughen bail and sentencing laws

children.content: The Victorian opposition has pledged to expand the government's "adult time for violent crime" laws and introduce a "one-strike" bail rule that would see re-offenders automatically denied bail.

image.altText: Liberal candidate for Kew Jess Wilson speaks to media.

items.title: Killers chauffeured interstate after Gavin Preston underworld hit, prosecutors allege

children.content: Prosecutors allege two men were chauffeured back to NSW after conducting a contract killing of the Melbourne underworld figure in 2023.

image.altText: A pale photo of an unsmiling, bald man between two blurred figures.

items.title: Alleged intruder denies Islamophobic attack at community dinner

children.content: Police say if there is sufficient evidence, a man accused of attacking people at a community dinner could be charged under hate speech laws.

image.altText: A man sits, handcuffed, in a community centre near two police officers.

items.title: Giant echidna fossil rewrites understanding of Victoria's prehistoric past

children.content: A fossil hidden in a museum collection for 119 years has revealed giant echidnas once roamed Victoria's east, filling a major gap in Australia's prehistoric record.

image.altText: an artist's impression of a giant echidna standing in grassland

items.title: Bomb squad called in after rental home cleaner finds explosives, drugs, cash

children.content: Authorities were forced to conduct controlled explosions at a property in Melbourne's north-west after a cleaner stumbled across drugs and explosives.

items.title: Incoming minister defends Setka friendship amid Victorian cabinet reshuffle

children.content: Four Labor MPs have been promoted to the Victorian government's ministry, with one of the incoming ministers defending her past support of disgraced CFMEU head John Setka.

image.altText: A woman wearing a striped blazer smiles for a professional portrait.

items.title: Terminally ill MP says ban on telehealth for assisted dying must change

children.content: A Labor politician living with MND writes to the attorney-general, calling for laws banning doctors from discussing voluntary assisted dying during telehealth appointments to be revised.

image.altText: Woman in read seated on set of stairs wearing a blue beanie.

items.title: Collard to learn sanction after being found guilty of homophobic slur

children.content: St Kilda forward Lance Collard will learn via an AFL hearing how heavy a suspension he will receive after being found guilty of using a homophobic slur towards a VFL opponent.

image.altText: A St Kilda AFL player holds a football in one hand in a warm-up before a game.

items.title: Backyard astronomer who helped to discover 100 distant planets awarded medal

children.content: From a backyard observatory in regional Victoria, Gippsland astronomer Chris Stockdale spends his nights helping confirm distant planets by tracking tiny changes in starlight that reveal new worlds beyond our solar system.

image.altText: A man wearing glasses and a blue button-down shirt, holding a box and grabbing a large telescope

items.title: Caretaker files for possession of impressionist Frederick McCubbin's former country home

children.content: A court has heard claims the former home of an Australian impressionist is not safe to walk through, with "black mould, evidence of vermin and wheelie bins collecting rainwater".

gallery.altText: A two-storey green house with brick chimneys.

thumbnail.altText: A two-storey green house with brick chimneys.

items.title: Memorial for women allegedly killed by men removed from Melbourne laneway

children.content: The founder of Australian Femicide Watch says she is heartbroken over the removal of the She Matters mural in Hosier Lane dedicated to more than 200 women who have died since January 2025.

image.altText: A person stands at the top of a ladder against a wall with women's pictures as a crowd gathers below.

items.title: Teen who 'weaponised' stolen cars denied bail over risk to community

children.content: A 13-year-old girl is facing court over 109 charges relating to incidents including allegedly driving into a cyclist.

image.altText: Police motorbikes

items.title: The recycling project turning used tennis balls into shoes

children.content: What should be done with all those used tennis balls that get inevitably sent to landfill? Lilian Xu might have found the answer.

gallery.altText: Lilian Xu sits with red shoes next to tennis balls in the stands of Kooyng Tennis Club.

thumbnail.altText: Lilian Xu sits with red shoes next to tennis balls in the stands of Kooyng Tennis Club.

avatar.alt: A man smiles as he presents the television news.

items.title: Health minister and veteran MPs step down before Victorian state election

children.content: Long serving Labor MPs Mary-Anne Thomas, Danny Pearson and Gayle Tierney have announced they will not contest the 2026 state election.

image.altText: Mary Anne Thomas, Danny Pearson, Gayle Tierney

items.title: Victorian government tried to keep major housing budget blowout under wraps

children.content: Internal documents the Victorian government tried to withhold reveal that a landmark social housing construction project was facing a significant budget blowout two years after it was unveiled.

image.altText: aerial shot of melbourne showing houses and city skyscrapers

items.title: Hiker found 'safe and well' after spending 24 hours lost in Victoria's north-west

children.content: Police have located a hiker who separated from his group and was missing for more than 24 hours in Victoria's north-west.

image.altText: Police finds missing camper Andy

items.title: Farmer braces for backlash after speaking up in support of transmission lines

children.content: A farmer in Victoria's north is offering up his property for transmission lines as part of the VNI West project, saying it would give him a chance to diversify his income.

image.altText: A transmission tower and power lines over a farm

items.title: 'Cosplay is not consent': The rules of dressing up for conventions

children.content: Cosplayers say their hobby has had an astronomical rise in popularity over the past decade. While the subculture promotes "no limits" creativity, there are still strict rules.

avatar.alt: A man smiles as he presents the television news.
